concept: Design a puzzle game where the player manipulates conveyor belts to properly sort packages of different shapes, sizes, and materials to their correct destinations. The factory layout becomes increasingly complex with branching paths, merging conveyor junctions, and special processing stations that transform packages. Timing becomes crucial as certain destinations only accept packages at specific intervals, requiring precise coordination of multiple conveyor speeds. Special challenge packages require specific routing through transformation stations in the correct sequence before delivery. The narrative follows an automated factory regaining functionality after a mysterious shutdown, with each successfully completed level restoring operations to different factory sectors.
